starter.audience: Individuals exploring the product; use OSS/source verify for free, or subscribe for licensed npm.
starter.valueUnlock: Account and API key; licensed npm verify requires an active Team+ subscription (trial ok). Use the default OSS build from source for free verify without a subscription.

team.audience: Small teams running verification in CI or staging with steady volume.
team.valueUnlock: Licensed contract and quick verify with monthly quota; CI locks and enforce use the same active subscription.

business.audience: Larger pipelines or multiple services needing headroom and predictable billing.
business.valueUnlock: Highest licensed verify limits; CI locks and enforce included under the same subscription.

enterprise.audience: Organizations needing custom limits, terms, or procurement.
